title: [ARC] arcilator FlattenModulesPass self-RAUW assertion crash with self-referential port connection

features.name: self_referential_instance_port_connection
features.description: Code should include an instance connection where the same signal is connected to both an input port and an output port of the instance

features.name: nested_module_definition
features.description: Code should include a module definition nested inside another module definition

features.name: combinational_output_from_input
features.description: Code should include an output port directly driven by an input port within the same module
